market_overview.narrative: 2026 is widely considered the 'golden season' for Perp DEX airdrops. Competition has shifted from technology to incentives.

protocols.name: Hyperliquid
protocols.description: The dominant perp DEX by market share. Custom L1 chain with sub-second execution. First airdrop in Nov 2024 was one of the largest in DeFi history. HIP-3 enabled permissionless perp markets; HIP-4 (Feb 2026) introduced native prediction markets and options.

key_metrics.open_interest: $9 billion (54% of all perp DEX OI)

airdrop_details.genesis_airdrop: Completed Nov 2024 - billions in value distributed
airdrop_details.remaining_community_allocation: 42.88% of HYPE supply remaining (38.88% Future Emissions + 4% unclaimed)
how_to_earn: Trade spot or leveraged perpetual futures
Focus on trading pairs with low open interest
Activity on HyperEVM may also be rewarded

protocols.funding: Self-funded (no VC funding)
notable_events: Ripple Prime integrated Hyperliquid on Feb 4, 2026 (first Wall Street-DeFi derivatives connection)
MetaMask integrated Hyperliquid for in-wallet perpetual trading

protocols.name: Lighter
chains: Lighter L2 (custom Ethereum L2 with ZK circuits)
Multi-chain support: Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Avalanche
protocols.description: High-performance on-chain perpetual futures exchange using custom zero-knowledge circuits. Zero-fee trading model. Was the biggest DEX by 30-day volume at peak. Emerged as the most aggressive competitor to Hyperliquid.

airdrop_details.points_system: Lighter Points distributed weekly based on trading volume
how_to_earn: Trade actively (zero-fee model allows funding arbitrage)
Provide liquidity in low OI pairs
Deposit into User Pool for passive point earning
airdrop_details.vesting: Team/investor: 1-year lockup + 3-year linear vesting; Ecosystem via points/airdrops

protocols.funding: Backed by a16z, Lightspeed Venture Partners, Founders Fund

protocols.name: Paradex
protocols.description: Zero-fee, privacy-focused DEX on Starknet incubated by Paradigm. Unified portfolio margin across spot, perps, and options. Supports 250+ markets. Privacy via zk-encrypted accounts.

airdrop_details.season_2_extension: Extended by up to 6 months for DIME listing preparation
how_to_earn: Trade to earn Position XP, Fee XP, Liquidation XP
Deposit USDC into Vault for Vault XP
Referral program (10% of invitee's XP; invitees get 5% XP boost)
Link X/Discord for anti-sybil community XP boost

protocols.funding: Incubated by Paradigm (access to 3,000+ institutions)

protocols.name: Pacifica
protocols.description: Next-gen Perp DEX on Solana co-founded by Constance Wang (ex-FTX COO). Fully self-funded with no VC funding (Hyperliquid model). Hybrid architecture with off-chain matching + on-chain settlement (<20ms latency). Integrates AI trading agents.

airdrop_details.estimated_token_value: ~$1.09 per unit (community estimate at 25% airdrop / $10B FDV)
airdrop_details.anti_sybil: Active anti-sybil system with retroactive point slashing for wash traders
how_to_earn: Get invite code from existing users or community giveaways

protocols.funding: Self-funded (no VC funding)

protocols.name: edgeX
chains: Transitioning to EDGE Chain (custom Ethereum L2)
protocols.description: High-performance perp DEX incubated by Amber Group ($5B AUM). Processes 200,000 orders/sec with <10ms matching latency. Team from Morgan Stanley, Barclays, Goldman Sachs, Bybit.

airdrop_details.pre_tge_season: Launched Jan 7, 2026 - XP distributed weekly until TGE
how_to_earn: Spot trading (3x XP multiplier on volume)
Trade on mobile app (1.2x XP boost)
EpicSer NFT (guarantees airdrop allocation - requires Discord activity)

protocols.funding: Incubated by Amber Group (manages $50B AUM)

protocols.name: GRVT
chains: zkSync Validium L2 (ZK Stack architecture, L3 appchain)
protocols.description: Hybrid exchange combining CEX user experience with self-custody and privacy on zkSync Validium. L3 appchain optimized for high-performance perpetual trading with Ethereum-level security via ZK proofs.
protocols.funding: Further Ventures, ZKsync, EigenCloud, 500 Global

protocols.name: Extended (formerly X10)
protocols.description: High-performance Perp DEX on Starknet with hybrid CLOB (off-chain matching <10ms, on-chain settlement). Supports 50+ markets including TradFi (EUR/USD, Gold, S&P 500, Brent Oil). Founded by ex-Revolut executives.

how_to_earn: Trade spot tokens or leveraged perpetual futures
Deploy trading bots for delta-neutral strategies
Deploy stablecoins into Extended vaults for passive yield

protocols.funding: $6.5M from Tioga Capital, Semantic Ventures, Prelude, StarkWare, Cyber Fund

protocols.name: Avantis
protocols.description: First perps DEX invested by Base. Zero-fee perpetual trading for RWAs and crypto with up to 500x leverage. Improved liquidity pool model over GMX/Synthetix.

airdrop_details.vault_apy: Up to 32% APY for passive farming
how_to_earn: Trade perpetuals (zero fees on losing trades)

protocols.funding: $4M seed (Pantera, Founders Fund, Galaxy, Base Ecosystem Fund), $8M Series A (Pantera, Founders Fund, Salt Fund)

protocols.name: Ethereal
chains: Ethereal Chain (L3 on Ethena Network / Arbitrum One / Celestia DA)
protocols.description: Non-custodial spot and perpetual DEX built as L3 on Ethena Network. Uses USDe for margin trading. Margin accounts earn daily returns while holding positions. Custom sequencer targets sub-20ms execution.

airdrop_details.ena_staker_allocation: 15% of Ethereal token allocated to ENA stakers
airdrop_details.season_0: Active - deposit USDe to earn Ethereal Points + 30x Ethena rewards
how_to_earn: Use eUSDe in DeFi integrations for additional points

protocols.funding: Backed by Ethena Labs ecosystem

protocols.name: Variational
protocols.description: P2P trading protocol on Arbitrum using Request-for-Quote model. Flagship app Omni offers 500+ markets including exotics (volatility indices, RWAs, interest rate swaps, in-game items). Zero-fee model with unique Loss Rebate program (2-4% refund on losses).

how_to_earn: Cumulative trading volume is key metric
Previously in closed beta (referral code from Discord needed)

protocols.funding: $11.8M across 2 rounds - Coinbase Ventures, Dragonfly Capital, North Island Ventures, HackVC

protocols.name: Ostium
protocols.description: RWA-focused perp DEX on Arbitrum offering perpetual swaps on stocks, commodities, indices, forex, and crypto. Uses 'perpification' model - on-chain price exposure without tokenizing underlying assets. Up to 200x leverage.

airdrop_details.boost_windows: Rolling week-long periods with incentivized asset groups
how_to_earn: Deposit USDC into OLP Vault (~28% APR)
Participate during Boost Windows for extra rewards

protocols.funding: $23.5M from Coinbase Ventures, Wintermute Ventures, GSR, Susquehanna (SIG), Crucible Capital
protocols.team: Harvard alumni: Kaledora Kiernan-Linn (CEO, ex-Bridgewater), Marco Antonio Ribeiro

protocols.name: Reya Network
chains: Evolving to Ethereum L1 based rollup
protocols.description: First trading venue enshrined in Ethereum L1. Modular Ethereum-native stack with based rollup architecture, delegated sequencing, and ZK finality. Zero gas, MEV-proof, yield-bearing collateral (srUSD, wstETH).

protocols.name: Aster (formerly Astherus + APX Finance)
protocols.description: Multi-chain perps DEX with dual trading modes (Simple/Pro). Supports hidden limit orders, 24/7 stock perpetuals alongside crypto. Up to 1001x leverage on select pairs. Emerged from 2024 merger of Astherus (yield) + APX Finance (perps).

airdrop_details.stage_4: 120M ASTER distributed; 50% immediate claim + 100% vested claim option
how_to_earn: 'Machi Mode' - liquidated users receive point rewards

protocols.funding: Binance ecosystem (YZi Labs connection)

protocols.name: Genius Terminal
chains: Multi-chain (EVM, Solana, Sui) - Routes through Hyperliquid & Aster
protocols.description: Multi-chain trading terminal backed by YZi Labs with CZ as advisor. Routes orders through Hyperliquid and Aster. Zero-fee, non-custodial, single-margin setup. Privacy-first with advanced privacy protocol coming late 2026.

key_metrics.investment: Multi-8-figure strategic investment from YZi Labs

airdrop_details.season_1: 200M GP total, 10M GP distributed weekly until Apr 12, 2026
airdrop_details.dual_farming: Trade perps to earn points from both Hyperliquid/Aster AND Genius
airdrop_details.point_rates: 1 GP per $100 spot volume, 1 GP per $1K perp volume
how_to_earn: Dual-farm with Hyperliquid or Aster simultaneously

protocols.funding: YZi Labs (multi-8-figure investment), CZ as advisor

protocols.name: Nado
protocols.description: Full-featured CLOB DEX on Ink (Kraken's L2). Built by former Kraken team. Orderbook-based with 5-15ms latency. Unified margin account for spot, perps, and currency markets. Open Beta Season 1 active.

airdrop_details.open_beta_season_1: Active - weekly distributions for trading, NLP, referrals
how_to_earn: Trade on the platform during Open Beta
Hold Templars of the Storm NFT

protocols.funding: Built by ex-Kraken team; backed by Kraken ecosystem

protocols.name: Perpl
protocols.description: Fully on-chain perp DEX on Monad with Central Limit Order Book architecture. Leverages Monad's 10,000 TPS, 500ms block times, and near-zero gas fees. Team relocated from US to London for regulatory clarity.
protocols.funding: $9.25M from Dragonfly, Ergonia, Brevan Howard, Breed, L1D, CMS
protocols.partnership: Partnership with Agora (AUSD stablecoin - backed by Paradigm/Dragonfly)

protocols.name: RISEx
protocols.description: Flagship perp DEX on Rise Chain (high-performance Ethereum L2). Fully on-chain orderbook with sub-3ms execution. Acquired BSX Labs (perp DEX on Base). Gas-sponsored trading via RISE Wallet.

airdrop_details.bsx_holder_allocation: 1.5% of RISE token supply for BSX token holders
airdrop_details.status: Public testnet active; closed mainnet this quarter; public launch early 2026
how_to_earn: Trade on public testnet at testnet.rise.trade
Join waitlist for early mainnet access

protocols.funding: $7M from Vitalik Buterin, Galaxy; BSX Labs funded by Base and Blockchain Capital

protocols.name: SynFutures
protocols.description: Pioneering perp DEX with first-ever unified AMM and on-chain orderbook model (oAMM). Won Blast Big Bang competition. Expanding into stocks, indices, and RWA perps in 2026. Builder Program enables third parties to launch perp DEXs.

airdrop_details.oyster_odyssey: Original points program for Blast airdrop qualification

protocols.funding: Pantera Capital, Polychain Capital, Susquehanna (SIG), Dragonfly Capital, Standard Crypto, Framework Ventures
roadmap_2026: Builder Program for third-party perp DEXs

protocols.name: dYdX
protocols.description: Pioneer perp DEX now running as Cosmos AppChain (v4). Decentralized in-memory orderbook with off-chain matching and on-chain settlement. 220+ crypto markets. Original airdrop in 2021 was worth $800M.

airdrop_details.current_incentives: Affiliate Booster Programs ($210K pools), trading rewards

protocols.name: Vertex Protocol
protocols.description: All-in-one DEX on Arbitrum with hybrid orderbook-AMM model. Vertically integrated spot, perps, and money markets. Revenue sharing via USDC for VRTX stakers.

protocols.name: GMX
protocols.description: Pioneer decentralized perpetual exchange. V2 architecture uses GLV and GM pools. Expanded from Arbitrum to Solana. Received largest Arbitrum incentive grant (12M ARB).

protocols.name: ApeX Protocol
protocols.category: Multi-chain Perpetual DEX / Spot / RWAs / Prediction Markets
protocols.description: Multi-chain perp DEX incubated by Davion Labs (supported by Bybit). Built on zkLink Nova for cross-chain liquidity. Supports crypto perps, spot, RWAs, and prediction markets. Active token buyback program ($9.6M bought back).

protocols.name: Drift Protocol
protocols.description: Largest open-source perpetual futures exchange on Solana. V3 upgrade (late 2025) brought faster execution and deeper liquidity. Surpassed by Pacifica in daily volumes.

airdrop_details.status: Original airdrop completed; focus now on trading rewards

protocols.name: Jupiter Perps
protocols.description: Leading Solana DEX aggregator that also offers perpetual futures. Airdrop completed. Current focus on ecosystem expansion (Jupiter Lend, etc.).

protocols.name: Ranger Finance
protocols.description: Perpetual trading platform on Solana that aggregates liquidity from multiple DEXs. Users accumulate points through testnet usage, trading activity, and platform interaction.

protocols.name: IVX (Levo)
protocols.description: Decentralized derivatives platform on Berachain L1 with two product lines including Levo (CLOB for perpetuals). Features portfolio margining with unified accounts. Secured by Berachain's Proof-of-Liquidity.

airdrop_details.testnet_status: Active (Artio/Bartio testnets reward options trading users)
how_to_earn: Monitor for mainnet launch and points program

protocols.funding: Backed by Animoca, Avid3 Ventures

protocols.name: Kodiak
protocols.description: Combined spot and perpetuals DEX on Berachain L1, integrating both into a single DeFi platform. Leverages Berachain's Proof-of-Liquidity consensus.

protocols.name: Astros
protocols.description: Native perpetual futures DEX on Sui. Integrates NAVI Protocol's lending pools for enhanced capital efficiency, creating a self-sustaining trading-lending ecosystem.

protocols.name: Decibel
protocols.description: Fully on-chain trading engine natively built on Aptos. Currently in public testnet. Supports perpetual contracts, spot, and vault trading.

how_to_earn: Connect Aptos wallet and mint test USDC
Earn XP based on trading volume and ranking

protocols.name: Levana
protocols.description: Perpetual swaps platform on Sei blockchain. Uses 'Well-Funded Perps Model' (V2). Leverages Sei's sub-400ms finality and parallelized EVM. Up to 30x leverage on BTC, ETH and other pairs.

protocols.name: MYX Finance
protocols.description: Cross-chain perp DEX on Linea and BNB Chain. Uses Matching Pool Mechanism (MPM) for zero-slippage trading. 125x capital efficiency. USDC-margined perpetual futures with up to 50x leverage.

how_to_earn: Trade perpetuals on Linea or BNB Chain

protocols.name: Synthetix Perps
protocols.description: Launching perpetual derivatives DEX on Ethereum mainnet using hybrid on-chain/off-chain order matching. First successful CLOB perp DEX on Ethereum mainnet. BTC/ETH/SOL derivatives with up to 50x leverage.

airdrop_details.status: No new airdrop - focus on protocol usage incentives

protocols.name: Liquid (Aggregator)
protocols.description: Non-custodial perp DEX aggregator integrating Hyperliquid, Lighter, and Ostium into one interface. Manage all positions, yield, risk, and analytics in a single app.

protocols.name: Divergence
protocols.description: DeFi protocol for synthetic binary options on volatile crypto assets. Trade volatility rather than price. Targeting Tier-1 exchange listings in 2026.

protocols.name: Aevo

~70M AEVO bought back and burned via governance

alpha_researchers.note: Follow @prz_chojecki for perp DEX points calculators, @fiyalkin for perp DEX airdrop lists

key_strategies.delta_neutral_trading: Run price-neutral strategies to farm points without directional exposure
key_strategies.vault_deposits: Deposit USDC into protocol vaults for passive points + 10-32% APY
key_strategies.funding_rate_arbitrage: Exploit funding rate differences between platforms for low-risk volume
key_strategies.zero_fee_platforms: Prioritize Lighter, Paradex, Avantis, Genius for zero-fee farming
key_strategies.dual_farming: Use Genius Terminal to farm Hyperliquid/Aster + Genius simultaneously
key_strategies.self_funded_projects: Prioritize Hyperliquid and Pacifica (no VC dilution = larger community share)
key_strategies.cross_chain_deposits: Many platforms accept deposits from multiple chains (Ostium, Lighter, etc.)
key_strategies.anti_sybil_awareness: Most platforms actively detect wash trading; focus on genuine trading activity

risks.no_token_guarantee: Some platforms may never issue tokens
risks.liquidation_risk: Leveraged trading carries significant loss potential
risks.point_dilution: As more farmers join, individual point value decreases
risks.rug_pull_risk: Always verify contracts and team legitimacy
risks.ico_competition: Under Trump's crypto-lenient admin, ICOs are making a comeback, potentially replacing some airdrops
risks.token_unlock_pressure: Protocols like Aster have $700M+ in locked tokens awaiting unlock
